title: SLM_Skeleton
summary: A modular, research-friendly Transformer architecture for building and experimenting with small-scale language models.
content: A modular, research-friendly Transformer architecture for building and experimenting with small-scale language models — designed for learning, exploration, and open research.

title: Profession-Aware LLM Personalization
summary: A framework for generating user-personalized responses by integrating profession–question relevance scoring into LLM fine-tuning.
content: Developed a profession-aware LLM fine-tuning framework to generate user-personalized responses by integrating profession–question relevance scoring into the answer selection process. Designed and implemented DPO and GRPO-based answer ranking pipelines, leveraging relevance score differentials to construct a high-quality preference dataset (~150K samples) for model alignment. Demonstrated improved contextual alignment of LLM outputs with user background.

title: Gender Bias in Multimodal AI Systems
summary: Investigating and mitigating gender stereotypes in text-to-image and image-to-text pipelines using synthetic professional images.
content: Conducted a study on gender bias in multimodal AI, evaluating text-to-image and image-to-text pipelines using gender-neutral prompts and synthetic professional images. Identified gender propagation in image captioning and mitigated bias via a caption masking strategy. Discovered and analyzed occupation-linked gender stereotypes in image generation models.

title: Social Bias Mitigation in Knowledge Graphs
summary: Improving bias detection and mitigation in Knowledge Graph embeddings using PyKEEN and GraphVite.
content: Implemented and trained Knowledge Graph embeddings (TransE, ComplEx, DistMult, RotatE) on FB15K237 and Wikidata5m using PyKEEN, OpenKE, and GraphVite. Developed a Wiki5m dataset class and reverse-engineered training methodology to reproduce baseline. Improved bias detection accuracy in KG embeddings (68% → 71%) by refining data preprocessing pipelines.

title: MusicGenreClassifier
summary: A real-time music genre classifier using a fine-tuned DistilHuBERT model and Gradio web interface.
content: This project uses a fine-tuned DistilHuBERT model to classify music genres from the GTZAN dataset. It features a real-time web interface built with Gradio for seamless audio uploads and recording.

title: TrendPost
summary: A premium, AI-native LinkedIn workspace designed for real-time trend discovery and high-engagement content creation.
content: TrendPost is a high-fidelity AI assistant featuring a professional-grade Workspace Layout, real-time Discovery Mode, and multi-model support (Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, HuggingFace). It uses a custom AI environment and sleek glassmorphism UI for a premium creator experience.

title: AtomPDF
summary: A premium, ad-free PDF utility built with Flutter for seamless merging, splitting, and compressing of documents. Published on PlayStore.
content: AtomPDF is a lightweight, ad-free mobile application designed for seamless PDF management. It offers essential tools like merging, splitting, and compressing PDFs without intrusive ads or paywalls, focusing on speed and simplicity.

title: ChatStat
summary: A Streamlit-based WhatsApp chat analyzer designed to provide insightful statistics and visualizations.
content: A Streamlit-based WhatsApp chat analyzer designed to provide insightful statistics about your conversations and visualizations like word clouds, sentiment analysis, and activity maps.

title: Pragmatic Language Understanding in Humans vs LLMs
summary: A comparative study of pragmatic language comprehension between humans and LLMs using a custom Hindi dataset.
content: Compared pragmatic language understanding between humans and LLMs. Created a Hindi dataset and evaluated GPT-4 Turbo and OpenHathi on metaphor, hyperbole, indirect speech, and humor, benchmarking their performance against human understanding. Found that GPT-4 demonstrated surprising strength in metaphor comprehension, even outperforming humans in some aspects.

title: ResearchAssistant
summary: A Streamlit-based research assistant that uses LangGraph to build a multi-step workflow for searching academic papers on arXiv.
content: A Streamlit-based research assistant that uses LangGraph to build a multi-step workflow for searching academic papers on arXiv, selecting one, and performing question answering directly on its content.
